team_name: PRATIDHVANI: Conflict-Free Bidirectional Interoperability Fabric for Karnataka's Single Window System
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests between Karnataka's Single Window System (SWS) and department systems using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
optimization_claims: conflict convergence without modifying a single line of code in SWS or any department system
constraints_addressed: UBID as the only trustworthy join key
every byte of propagated state must be auditable to a formal government standard
